title: DENTAL PROGRAM - 211info
text: COMMUNITY HEALTH PARTNERS DENTAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a dental clinic four times per year, in partnership with the University of Washington Dental School. Services include screenings, fillings, removal of teeth, and treatment of infection. 945 Washington Way Suite 141 Longview, WA 98632 Eligibility: -Medicaid-eligible children over the age of 6 and their parents -Low-income veterans without dental coverage -Ages 60 and older who are low-income and without dental coverage Hours: Clinics are held four times per year Email (360) 442-4165 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 442-4165 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to register FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Dental Prosthodontics Dental Restoration Dental Screening General Dentistry Geriatric Dentistry Pediatric Dentistry Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - VISION CLINIC HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - CHRONIC CARE MEDICAL CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - URGENT CARE CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY HEALTH PARTNERS
